trade.summary: Solid bilateral trade. Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals, machinery, and precision instruments. Israele exports diamonds (processed), pharmaceuticals, and high-tech products. A bilateral free trade agreement is in place.

diplomatic.summary: Svizzera maintains friendly relations with Israele while also engaging with Palestinian leadership through its humanitarian role. As a neutral state, Svizzera hosts international dialogues on Middle East issues. Geneva hosts various diplomatic efforts related to the region. The Gaza conflict since 2023 has created some diplomatic tension.

military.summary: No military alliance. Svizzera's neutrality precludes defense cooperation. Svizzera maintains strict arms export controls. Some Swiss companies have dual-use technology relationships with Israelei defense firms.

financial.summary: Svizzera manages significant Israelei private wealth. Swiss banks are active in Israelei financial markets. Israelei tech companies access European capital markets through Svizzera. Significant bilateral investment in pharmaceuticals and technology.

energy.summary: Limited direct energy trade. Some cooperation on solar energy technology. Israele's natural gas exports may eventually reach Svizzera through European networks.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific collaboration in biotechnology, computer science, and materials science. Swiss and Israelei universities maintain active exchange programs. Joint publications in life sciences and physics are substantial.
